solution: 
```java
class Solution {
    public int findComplement(int num) {
        int bitLength = 0;
        int mask = 0;
        while (num >> bitLength > 0) {
            bitLength++;
        }
        mask = (1 << bitLength) - 1;
        return num ^ mask;
    }
}
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: <The solution calculates the bit length of the input number to create a mask with all 1s of the same length. It then uses XOR to flip the bits of the number. The approach is efficient and avoids unnecessary operations.>
